Who We Are

Restoring dignity to the overlooked.

Based in Celina, TX, True Vine Spellers Academy bridges the gap between profound cognitive ability and the motor challenges that hide it. By presuming competence and delivering grade-level academics, we replace the low expectations of traditional special education with true restoration.

🎓

Mission

Unlocking the voices and God-given intellect of non-speaking students through presumed competence and academic equity.

✝️

Foundation

Built on John 15:4, every student here knows they are a masterpiece of God — fully known, fully loved, fully capable.

📅

Launch

Opening February 2027 in Celina, TX as a flagship model for faith-based Spellers Method education for non-speaking students.

"Abide in me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit by itself, unless it abides in the vine, neither can you, unless you abide in me."
— John 15:4 · The foundation of everything we do
📍 Location

North Texas — DFW Region

Serving families across Celina, TX and the greater DFW area with a campus designed from the ground up for the sensory, academic, and spiritual needs of our students.

Our Vision

We exist to prove that speech does not define intelligence.

We are building a school where communication is unlocked, not assumed absent. A place where every child is seen as the masterpiece they were created to be.

01

Academic Equity

Using the Spellers Method, we deliver grade-level curriculum for students previously stuck in "life-skills" loops. Every child deserves real education with real expectations.

02

Faith-First Identity

A foundation where every student knows they are a masterpiece of God — seen, known, and filled with divine purpose.

03

Clinical Integration

Merging Spellers Method instruction with whole-child therapeutic support — addressing the full person, not just the academic profile.

Our Model

The Spellers Method: Whole child. Whole potential.

Our integrated program is rooted in the Spellers Method — addressing every dimension of development: motor, academic, spiritual, and therapeutic.

🧠

Intentional Motor Development

Targeted exercises that build the motor pathways necessary for communication and independence.

👁️

Ocular Motor Strengthening

Specialized visual therapy to develop the eye tracking and focus needed for reading and learning.

🏃

Purposeful Movement Training

Movement-based learning that harnesses the connection between body and brain for academic growth.

🎵

Neurological Music Therapy

Evidence-based music therapy that activates neurological pathways for communication and regulation.

🌊

Aquatic Therapy

Water-based therapeutic sessions that support sensory integration, motor development, and joy.

✍️

Writing Development

Every student will write. Through the Spellers Method, we unlock written expression and give every learner a voice on the page.

✝️

Christian Bible Study

Faith-rooted discipleship woven into every school day — identity in Christ is foundational to everything.

📖

Grade-Level Academics

Rooted in the Spellers Method, we deliver real curriculum with real expectations — presuming competence and replacing life-skills ceilings with academic freedom.

👨‍👩‍👧

Family Partnership

Families are co-educators. We equip parents with tools, training, and community to continue the work at home.

Our Permanent Home

A sanctuary in the making.

We are identifying a 14-acre flagship site in Celina, TX — a nature-integrated campus designed specifically for the sensory and academic needs of our Spellers Method students.

$2.5M land acquisition goal
Campaign in progressPhase 1 of 3
14-Acre Vision

The search for our permanent home.

To fully realize our mission, True Vine Spellers Academy is identifying a 14-acre flagship site in Celina, TX — the first step in building a world-class, nature-integrated campus.

🌿

Nature-Integrated Design

Outdoor learning environments that engage the senses and support whole-child development.

🏫

Purpose-Built Classrooms

Sensory-informed spaces designed from the ground up for non-speaking students.

🌊

Therapeutic Facilities

On-site aquatic therapy, movement studios, and clinical integration spaces.

✝️

Faith Community Space

A chapel and gathering space where students, families, and staff worship together.

The People Behind the Mission

Meet our founders.

Three mothers. Three missions. One shared belief — that every nonspeaking child deserves to be heard.

Kristina Inzerillo
Co-Founder

Kristina holds a Master's in Business Administration and brings over 15 years of experience in fundraising and organizational development. She is currently pursuing her CP training and is passionate about sharing the gift of communication with her 8-year-old's peers, inspiring young minds through engaging interactions.

Gail Ulloa
Co-Founder

Gail brings over 16 years of experience in educational administration and holds a Bachelor's degree in Business Administration. As the proud mother of three — including a nonspeaking autistic son — she is deeply passionate about advocating for nonspeaking students and ensuring every child has a voice.

Sunny Talbert
Co-Founder

Sunny is currently pursuing her Spellers Practitioner certification to support nonspeaking individuals. As a mother of two — including a nonspeaking son — her personal journey has deeply shaped her passion for advocacy and meaningful communication for every child.

Give

Partner with us to unlock every voice.

Your generosity funds Spellers Method programs, campus development, and the belief that every non-speaking child deserves a world-class faith-based education.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about True Vine Spellers Academy, the Spellers Method, and how to get involved.

The Spellers Method is an evidence-based approach to communication that presumes competence in nonspeaking individuals. Rather than assuming limited intelligence due to the inability to speak, the Spellers Method teaches students to communicate by spelling out words and sentences — unlocking the voices and intellect that have always been present. It is grounded in the understanding that motor challenges, not cognitive limitations, are what prevent many nonspeaking individuals from communicating.

True Vine Spellers Academy is designed for nonspeaking and minimally speaking students who have historically been placed in "life-skills" programs rather than given access to grade-level academic instruction. We serve students with autism, motor differences, and other conditions that affect verbal communication — students whose intelligence has been underestimated or overlooked by traditional special education systems.

True Vine Spellers Academy is set to open in February 2027 in Celina, TX — located in the greater DFW area of North Texas. We are currently in the process of identifying our permanent 14-acre campus, which will be a nature-integrated facility purpose-built for the sensory and academic needs of our students. Stay connected via our Facebook page for updates on our campus search and launch timeline.

We are currently preparing for our February 2027 opening and will be accepting enrollment inquiries soon. To set every student up for success, we ask that families commit to at least 6 months of spelling practice prior to enrollment. These sessions will be conducted with our in-house Spellers Method therapist, ensuring every student builds a strong foundation and is fully prepared to thrive in our academic environment from day one. If you have a child you believe would benefit, we encourage you to reach out now to get on our interest list. Contact us at [email protected] or call 214-233-5366 to get on our interest list.

Yes. True Vine Spellers Academy is built on a Christian foundation, rooted in John 15:4. We believe every child is a masterpiece of God, created with purpose and dignity. Our curriculum integrates Christian Bible study and discipleship alongside academics and therapy. That said, our doors are open to all families who believe in the potential of their nonspeaking child — regardless of background.

Our whole-child model integrates a wide range of therapeutic and academic supports, including: intentional motor development, ocular motor strengthening, purposeful movement training, neurological music therapy, aquatic therapy, writing development, Christian Bible study, grade-level academics via the Spellers Method, and family partnership programming. Every element is designed to address the full child — body, mind, and spirit.

True Vine Spellers Academy is a nonprofit organization and we are committed to making our programs as accessible as possible to the families who need them most. We are actively fundraising through donations, grants, and community partnerships to reduce financial barriers. For specific tuition and funding questions as we approach our 2027 opening, please contact us at [email protected].

Every dollar makes a direct difference. You can donate through our Givebutter donation page on this site, which funds our programs, staff training, and our $2.5M land acquisition campaign to secure our permanent 14-acre campus in Celina, TX. You can also support us by volunteering, spreading the word, or following our journey on Facebook.

Traditional special education often places nonspeaking students in "life-skills" programs that assume limited cognitive ability based on the inability to speak. True Vine Spellers Academy takes the opposite approach — we presume full competence and deliver grade-level academics using the Spellers Method. We believe the barrier is motor, not intellectual, and we build our entire program around unlocking what is already there.
